activities.name: lk_get_pipeline_parameters
activities.description: Get the parameters to be used in this pipeline

oracleReaderQuery.value:
SELECT DISTINCT
  project_id, requisition_no, req_rev, req_originator, req_date, released_to_proc, proc_ack_date,
  DECODE((SELECT NVL(attr_char3, 'NOTAVAILABLE') FROM m_sys.m_projects WHERE proj_id = project_id),
  'PROJECT', mdr_pack_number,
  'MRO', (SELECT  mg_code FROM m_sys.m_material_groups mgg WHERE mgg.mg_id=get_mg_id),
  DECODE(mdr_pack_number, '-', (SELECT  mg_code FROM m_sys.m_material_groups mgg WHERE mgg.mg_id=get_mg_id), mdr_pack_number)
  ) matl_wrk_grp,
  DECODE((SELECT NVL(attr_char3, 'NOTAVAILABLE') FROM m_sys.m_projects WHERE proj_id = project_id),
  'PROJECT', (SELECT UNIQUE n.description FROM m_sys.m_material_group_nls n,m_sys.m_material_groups g WHERE mdr_pack_number = g.mg_code AND n.mg_id=g.mg_id AND n.nls_id=1),
  'MRO',(SELECT n.description FROM m_sys.m_material_group_nls n WHERE n.mg_id=get_mg_id),
  DECODE(mdr_pack_number, '-',(SELECT n.description FROM m_sys.m_material_group_nls n WHERE n.mg_id=get_mg_id),
  (SELECT UNIQUE n.description FROM m_sys.m_material_group_nls n,m_sys.m_material_groups g WHERE mdr_pack_number = g.mg_code AND n.mg_id=g.mg_id AND n.nls_id=1))
  ) matl_wrk_nls,
  rli_pos, rli_sub_pos,  released_qty, uom, ros_date, po_number, po_rev, po_description, po_status, status_date, 
  po_created_date, po_issue_date, po_approved_date, 
  supplier_code, supplier_name, supplier_location, country_of_origin,
  buyer,  select_code, payment_mode, commodity_code, ident_code,  item_desc,
  poli_pos, poli_sub_pos, account_code_item, poli_uom, poli_qty,
  unit_price_item, po_line_item_price,
  ROUND(get_exchange_rate * (poli_qty * poli_unit_price), 2) po_line_item_price_usd,
  po_total_cost, ROUND(get_exchange_rate * (total_price+tax_amount), 2) po_total_usd, po_currency, currency_po_item, 
  discount_percentage, incoterm, delivery_place,Group1,Group2,Group3,Group4,Group5, prom_delivery_date, 
  mrr_number, mrr_creation_date, mrr_recv_date, mrr_posted_date, mrr_quantity, is_master_tag
FROM
(
SELECT -- first select
get_poh.proj_id project_id, r.r_code requisition_no, r.r_supp req_rev, dummy_poli.poli_id,
	TO_CHAR(r.created_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') req_date,                    
	(SELECT /*+ index(u USR_PK) */  first_name||' '||last_name FROM m_sys.m_users u WHERE u.m_usr_id=r.originator AND ROWNUM<2) req_originator,
	TO_CHAR(r.rel_to_proc_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') released_to_proc,
	TO_CHAR(r.proc_acknowledge_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') proc_ack_date,
	r.mg_id get_mg_id,
	(SELECT attr_value 
    FROM m_sys.m_used_values uv, m_sys.m_attrs att
    WHERE uv.proj_id    = get_poh.proj_id
    AND   uv.attr_id    = att.attr_id
    AND   att.attr_code = 'MDR_PACKAGE_NUMBER'
    AND   uv.pk_id      = r.r_id
    AND   uv.used_type  = 'ER'
    AND   ROWNUM < 2) mdr_pack_number,                     
	rli.rli_pos, rli.rli_sub_pos,
 (SELECT /*+ index(cc CC_PK) */ commodity_code from m_sys.m_commodity_codes cc WHERE cc.commodity_id=i.commodity_id AND ROWNUM<2) commodity_code,
	i.ident_code,
	i.ident,
	REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(LTRIM(MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM_bir.GET_IDENT_DESC_WITH_DEVIATION(i.ident, dummy_poli.poli_id, 'POLI'),'-'),'^-'||' ?',''), CHR(13), ' '), CHR(10), ' '),'- ','') item_desc,  
	rli.total_release_qty released_qty,
	rli.unit_code uom,               
	TO_CHAR(rli.estimated_ros_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') ros_date,
	get_poh.poh_id, get_poh.buyer, get_poh.po_number, get_poh.po_rev,  get_poh.po_description,
	dummy_poli.poli_pos, dummy_poli.poli_sub_pos,
	(CASE
		WHEN (NVL(tc.total_price, 0) + NVL(dummy_poli.poli_qty, 0) = 0) THEN                           
		   DECODE((SUM(dummy_poli.poli_qty) OVER (PARTITION BY get_poh.poh_id, dummy_poli.poli_id)), 0, 'CANCELLED', get_poh.get_po_status) -- check if cancel
		ELSE                          
		  get_poh.get_po_status -- check without cancel 
		END) po_status,                      
	get_poh.status_date, get_poh.po_created_date, get_poh.po_approved_date, get_poh.po_issue_date,
	(SELECT /*+ index(un UNIT_PK) */ unit_code FROM m_sys.m_units un WHERE un.unit_id=dummy_poli.qty_unit_id) poli_uom,
	dummy_poli.poli_qty, get_poh.select_code, get_poh.payment_mode,                    
	(SELECT /*+ index(c C_PK) */ company_name FROM m_sys.m_companies c WHERE c.company_id=ms.company_id AND ROWNUM<2) supplier_name,
	ms.sup_code supplier_code,
	(SELECT description FROM m_sys.m_country_nls WHERE cy_id=ms.cy_id AND nls_id=1 AND ROWNUM<2) supplier_location,
	dummy_poli.poli_unit_price unit_price_item,
	ROUND(dummy_poli.poli_qty * dummy_poli.poli_unit_price,2) po_line_item_price,
	(SELECT /*+ index(un UNIT_PK) */ unit_code FROM m_sys.m_units un WHERE un.unit_id=dummy_poli.currency_id  AND ROWNUM<2) currency_po_item,
	NVL(get_poh.discount_percent,0) + NVL(dummy_poli.discount_percent,0) discount_percentage,
	(SELECT /*+ index(frt FRT_PK) */ frt_code FROM m_sys.m_freight_terms frt WHERE frt.frt_id = dummy_poli.frt_id  AND ROWNUM<2) incoterm,
	(SELECT /*+ index(j JOB_PK) */ job_number FROM m_sys.m_jobs j WHERE j.proj_id=r.proj_id AND j.job_id=dummy_poli.job_id  AND ROWNUM<2) account_code_item,
	dummy_poli.freight_value delivery_place,
	rli.attr_group1 Group1,
	rli.attr_group2 Group2,
	rli.attr_group3 Group3,
	rli.attr_group4 Group4,
	rli.attr_group5 Group5,
	ish.prom_contract_date prom_delivery_date,
	(SELECT /*+ index(c CY_PK) */ cy_code FROM m_sys.m_countries c WHERE c.cy_id=dummy_poli.cy_id  AND ROWNUM<2)||' ('||(SELECT /*+ index(cn CYN_PK) */ description FROM m_sys.m_country_nls cn WHERE cn.cy_id=dummy_poli.cy_id AND cn.nls_id=1  AND ROWNUM<2)||')' country_of_origin,
	ROUND(tc.total_price+NVL(tc.tax_amount,0),2) po_total_cost,
	po_currency,  get_poh.get_exchange_rate,
	ish.item_ship_pos, ish.item_ship_sub_pos, poli_unit_price,                    
	NVL(tc.total_price, 0) total_price,
	NVL(tc.tax_amount, 0) tax_amount,
	ish.item_ship_qty, ish.item_ship_id, get_mrr1.mrr_id,  mrr.mrr_number, 
	TO_CHAR(mrr.mrr_create_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') mrr_creation_date, 
	TO_CHAR(mrr.matl_recv_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') mrr_recv_date, 
	TO_CHAR(mrr.posted_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') mrr_posted_date,                      
	(SELECT SUM(recv_qty) FROM m_sys.m_inv_receipts irr WHERE irr.mrr_id=get_mrr1.mrr_id AND irr.item_ship_id=ish.item_ship_id) mrr_quantity,                      
	DECODE((SELECT COUNT(1) FROM m_sys.m_item_ships ish1 WHERE ish1.master_ish_id = ish.item_ship_id AND ROWNUM < 2), 1, 'Y', NULL) is_master_tag  
  
FROM -- Real Tables below
  m_sys.m_reqs r ------------------------Table-1 r
  ,(SELECT rr.proj_id, rr.r_id, (SELECT MAX(r1.r_id)  ------------------------Table-2 get_max_r
                        FROM m_sys.m_reqs r1
                        WHERE r1.proj_id = rr.proj_id
                        AND   r1.actual_ind = 'Y'
                        AND   r1.approved_date IS NOT NULL
                        --MZ-1124 AND TRUNC(rel_to_proc_date) <= TO_DATE(:P8103_GET_TO)
                        START WITH r1.r_id = rr.r_id
                        CONNECT BY PRIOR r1.r_id = r1.last_r_id) r_id_max
        FROM m_sys.m_reqs rr
        WHERE 1=1 -- and rr.proj_id = 'D7521'
        AND rr.actual_ind = 'Y'
        AND rr.approved_date IS NOT NULL
    )get_max_r
  ,(SELECT mrli.proj_id, r_id, rli_id, rli_pos, rli_sub_pos           ------------------------Table-3 rli
        , total_release_qty, estimated_ros_date, un.unit_code,attr_group1,attr_group2,attr_group3,attr_group4,attr_group5
        FROM m_sys.m_req_line_items mrli, m_sys.m_units un
        WHERE 1=1 -- and mrli.proj_id = 'D7521'
        AND released_ind   = 'Y'
        AND mrli.release_qty_unit_id = un.unit_id
	 )rli
  ,m_sys.m_po_line_items dummy_poli  ------------------------Table-4 dummy_poli
    ,(SELECT * FROM ------------------------Table-5 get_poli
        (SELECT max_poh.poh_id, max_poh.base_poh_id, poli.poli_id, proj_id
         FROM (
               SELECT MAX(poh1.poh_id) poh_id, poh1.base_poh_id, poh1.proj_id                             
               FROM m_sys.m_po_headers poh1
               WHERE 1=1 -- AND poh1.proj_id = 'D7521'
               --MZ-1124 AND  TRUNC(poh1.po_issue_date) BETWEEN TO_DATE(:P8103_GET_FROM) AND TO_DATE(:P8103_GET_TO)
               AND  TRUNC(poh1.po_issue_date) >= '01-Jan-2024' AND  TRUNC(poh1.po_issue_date)<= '01-Oct-2024'
               GROUP BY base_poh_id, poh1.proj_id
               ) max_poh,
              TABLE(MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_PO_LINE_ITEMS(max_poh.poh_id, 'Y')) poli
        WHERE max_poh.poh_id = poli.poh_id
        ORDER BY poh_id, poli_id
        )
        --MZ-1124 WHERE ((:P8103_FROM_IND = 1 AND ROWNUM < 1001) OR (:P8103_FROM_IND = 0 AND 1=1)) -- restrict records to 1000 when IND = 1
	)get_poli
  ,(SELECT poh.proj_id, poh.poh_id, po_number, po_supp po_rev, sup_id, discount_percent,  ------------------------Table-6 get_poh
        TO_CHAR(poh.creation_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') po_created_date,
        TO_CHAR(poh.approved_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') po_approved_date,
        TO_CHAR(poh.po_issue_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY') po_issue_date,
        (SELECT /*+ index(u USR_PK) */ first_name||' '||last_name FROM m_sys.m_users u WHERE u.m_usr_id=poh.buyer AND ROWNUM<2) buyer,
        (SELECT /*+ index(pohn PHN_PK) */ description FROM m_sys.m_po_header_nls pohn WHERE pohn.nls_id=1 AND pohn.poh_id=poh.poh_id AND ROWNUM<2) po_description, 
        MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_EXCHANGE_RATE_USD(poh.proj_id, SYSDATE, poh.currency_id) get_exchange_rate,
        (SELECT /*+ index(un UNIT_PK) */ unit_code FROM m_sys.m_units un WHERE un.unit_id=poh.currency_id AND ROWNUM<2) po_currency,
         (SELECT attr_value
         FROM m_sys.m_used_values uv, m_sys.m_attrs att
         WHERE uv.proj_id    = poh.proj_id
         AND   uv.attr_id    = att.attr_id
         AND   att.attr_code = 'SELECT_CODE'
         AND   uv.pk_id      = poh.poh_id
         AND   uv.used_type  = 'PO'
         AND   ROWNUM < 2) select_code,                     
        (SELECT attr_value
         FROM m_sys.m_used_values uv, m_sys.m_attrs att
         WHERE uv.proj_id    = poh.proj_id
         AND   uv.attr_id    = att.attr_id
         AND   att.attr_code = 'PAYMENT_MODE'
         AND   uv.pk_id      = poh.poh_id
         AND   uv.used_type  = 'PO'
         AND   ROWNUM < 2) payment_mode,
         NVL2(po_close_date, 'CLOSED', NVL2(po_issue_date, 'ISSUED', NVL2(approved_date, 'APPROVED', NVL2(rfa_date, 'FROZEN', 'CONFIRMED')))) get_po_status,
         TO_CHAR(NVL2(po_close_date, po_close_date, NVL2(po_issue_date, po_issue_date, NVL2(approved_date, approved_date, NVL2(rfa_date, rfa_date, lmod)))), 'DD-MON-YYYY') status_date
    FROM m_sys.m_po_headers poh
    WHERE 1=1 --AND poh.proj_id = 'D7521'
      AND  TRUNC(poh.po_issue_date) >= '01-Jan-2024'
      AND   poh.po_issue_date IS NOT NULL
	)get_poh
  ,m_sys.m_idents i                 ------------------------Table-7 idents               
	,m_sys.m_po_total_costs tc        ------------------------Table-8 tc  total_costs
	,m_sys.m_overview_suppliers ms    ------------------------Table-9 ms  overview_suppliers    ------INC1591215 by Vineet  
	--MZ1124 ,m_sys.m_company_addrs mca        ------------------------Table-10 company_addrs mca   not in select / not in use
  ,m_sys.m_item_ships ish           ------------------------Table-11 company_addrs ish  
  ,(SELECT  MAX(mrr.mrr_id) mrr_id, mrr.proj_id, mrr_number, item_ship_id  ------------------------Table-12 get_mrr1
      FROM m_sys.m_matl_recv_rpts mrr, m_sys.m_inv_receipts ir
      WHERE 1=1 -- mrr.proj_id = 'D7521'
        AND   ir.proj_id  = mrr.proj_id
        AND   mrr.mrr_id  = ir.mrr_id
        GROUP BY mrr.proj_id, mrr_number, item_ship_id                 
	)get_mrr1
  ,m_sys.m_matl_recv_rpts mrr       ------------------------Table-13 mrr 

  --- Final WHERE Clause is down 
	WHERE 1=1
  AND  r.proj_id in (select distinct proj_id from m_sys.m_jobs j 
                      where (j.field2 =  '0100' and field1 in ('0923', '0921', '0950'))  or  
                            (j.field2 <> '0100' and substr(field2,1,4) in ('0923', '0921', '0950')))  -- 0923, 0921, 0950
  AND  r.proj_id = get_max_r.proj_id
	AND  r.actual_ind = 'Y'
	AND  get_max_r.r_id_max = r.r_id
  AND  get_max_r.r_id = rli.r_id --AND r.proj_id = rli.proj_id
	AND  rli.rli_id = dummy_poli.rli_id --AND r.proj_id = dummy_poli.proj_id
	AND  dummy_poli.poli_id = get_poli.poli_id
	AND  get_poh.poh_id     = get_poli.poh_id
	AND  i.ident            = dummy_poli.ident --//RN: added to link with ident  
	AND  get_poh.poh_id     = tc.poh_id(+)
	AND  get_poh.sup_id     = ms.sup_id
  AND  get_poli.poli_id   = ish.poli_id(+) --//RN: change to left join to get record without itemshipment  
  AND  ish.proj_id        = r.proj_id
	AND  ish.item_ship_id   = get_mrr1.item_ship_id(+)
	AND  get_mrr1.mrr_id     = mrr.mrr_id(+)
 )  
ORDER BY project_id , po_number, poli_pos, poli_sub_pos
